Singularity Finance token migration
Migrate your tokens to SFI
Network
Ethereum
Old Token
SDAO
New Token
SFI
Balance: 0 SDAO
Conversion Rate: 1 SDAO1 SFI
SDAO tokens will migrate to SFI at a conversion rate of 1 SDAO to 1 SFI

Singularity Finance token Migration

  • Conversion Rate:
    • The token conversion ratios for the migration to SFI are as follows:
    • 1 SDAO = 1 SFI
    • 1 CGV = 0.14122 SFI
    • 1 KEY = 0.00125 SFI
  • Further Information:
    • The conversion rate was fixed before the merger announcement to prevent market fluctuations from affecting the conversion
    • The total supply of SFI will be 500m
    • The complete terms of the merger can be read in the original governance vote
    • SelfKey to SFI migration is only available for 90 days
  • Disclaimer
    • This interface and the underlying smart contract are made available on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis without any warranties of any kind. Using this interface and the underlying smart contract for token conversion involves technological and economic risks, including potential security vulnerabilities, bugs, and market volatility that could lead to financial loss. We disclaim any liability for any losses, damages, or adverse consequences arising from the use of the smart contract.
